summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Bell inequality demonstration. Three polarizer Circles A=0° (BLUE), B=22.5° (PURPLE), C=45° (GREEN) rendered with rotatable Line axes across the top. Left column: three MathTex rows giving QM predictions P(A≠B)=sin²(22.5°)≈0.146, P(B≠C)≈0.146, P(A≠C)=sin²(45°)=0.5. Right column: the LHV triangle bound P(A≠C) ≤ P(A≠B)+P(B≠C), then the explicit violation 0.500 ≰ 0.293 in RED boxed by SurroundingRectangle, and YELLOW conclusion that local hidden variables are excluded.
